theme_strategy.rationale: Cyberpunk 2077 aesthetic requires a deep, void-like dark mode to allow high-contrast neon accents to pop. No light mode toggle; this is an atmospheric, nightclub/hostel utility that lives in the dark.

typography.strategy: The 'Editorial Future' mixed with 'Terminal' logic. High impact, readable, angular.

headings.usage: Hero text, page titles, large numbers. MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.

body.usage: Data tables, queues, track lengths, secondary text. Monospace fits the terminal/hacker vibe.

ui.usage: Buttons, general UI elements where JetBrains is too wide.

rules: DO NOT use Inter or generic sans-serif for headings.
Overlines MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.
No full-screen gradients. Use solid dark backgrounds with neon accents.
Text over neon backgrounds MUST be #050505 for maximum contrast.
Focus states MUST have HIGHER contrast (e.g., focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#00F0FF] focus:shadow-[0_0_10px_#00F0FF]).
Hover state color MUST be a lighter hue of ACTIVE state color.

surface_strategies.name: The Terminal Look (Retro-Futurism)
surface_strategies.implementation: Background: #050505. Borders: 1px solid #00F0FF with 30% opacity. Subtle drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] on active elements. Add CSS repeating-linear-gradient scanlines overlay on empty states.

surface_strategies.name: Optical Clarity Glassmorphism
surface_strategies.implementation: bg-black/80 with backdrop-blur-xl and backdrop-saturate-150. 1px delicate top/bottom border (border-cyan/20) to separate from content. DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds.

visual_enhancers.shadows_and_glows: Replace traditional soft drop-shadows with harsh block shadows (translate x/y) or neon glows (box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--neon-cyan)).

admin_dashboard.strategy: High Density Grid (The Technical Look). Exposed skeleton.
rules: Every pixel utilized, h-full on children to match neighbors.
Use border-collapse style layouts for tables and lists.

customer_portal.layout: Sticky header (Glass), scrollable list, Fixed bottom tab nav (Glass).
customer_portal.spacing: Generous vertical spacing (p-6 to p-8) to prevent fat-finger mistakes.

rules: Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly. Leave breathing room.
SHAPE: Replace all rounded corners (rounded-md, rounded-lg) in Shadcn with rounded-none for a brutalist, sharp cyberpunk aesthetic. Or use extreme clip-paths for angled corners.

BUTTONS: Cyber Yellow (#FCEE0A) background with Black (#050505) text for primary actions. Cyan for secondary. Hover states should translate-y-[-2px] and add a solid block shadow (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#FF003C]).
CARDS: Remove default Shadcn shadow. Apply border border-cyan/30 bg-black/60. On hover, increase border opacity to 100% and add inset cyan glow.
TABLE/QUEUE: Alternating row backgrounds (bg-white/5) with monospace track lengths. Highlight currently playing row with #00F0FF border and subtle pulse animation.
INPUTS: bg-black border-cyan/40 text-white placeholder-white/30. Focus: border-cyan/100 ring-1 ring-cyan/100.

specific_components.BottomNav: Fixed bottom, bg-[#050505]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-cyan/30. Icons must be neon when active.
specific_components.PlayerControls: Sticky or fixed section. Large typography for track time. Sharp rectangular play/pause buttons.
specific_components.QRCode: Render with Cyan or Cyber Yellow on Black instead of standard black on white.

guidelines: Use harsh, fast easing for transitions to mimic mechanical/digital speed (e.g., cubic-bezier(0.17, 0.67, 0.83, 0.67)).
Glitch effects on load or hover for headings (translate quickly horizontally).
Subtle breathing pulse on the 'Currently Playing' indicator.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the glitch effects.
DO NOT use `transition: all`. Specify exact properties (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Cyber Yellow and Cyan have pure black (#050505) text layered on top for WCAG AA compliance.
accessibility.focus: High visibility focus rings using Hot Pink or Cyan.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='play-button', data-testid='queue-item').

icons.style: Duotone or bold. Use strict geometric icons to fit the cyberpunk theme.

images.description: Energetic nightclub scene with people dancing under colorful neon lights.
DJ performing in a nightclub with vivid lights

3d_and_creative.usage: Use Framer Motion for glitch animations on text and page transitions. Avoid heavy WebGL/Three.js on the customer portal to maintain mobile performance.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are rebuilding a hybrid app: QueueIt. It contains an Admin Dashboard, a Customer Portal, and a Marketing Website.
Apply a strict Cyberpunk 2077 neon aesthetic. Eradicate all rounded corners (use rounded-none).
Replace all generic Shadcn shadows with solid neon block shadows or glowing box-shadows.
Setup routing or component switching to demonstrate all 3 views: Admin (Player/Queue/QR), Customer (Search/Request), Marketing.
Fonts: Add Google Fonts imports for Unbounded and JetBrains Mono.
Ensure all components use data-testid for testing.
DO NOT use a global `text-align: center`. Left-align tabular and grid data.
Use framer-motion to create a 'glitch' entrance effect for the marketing hero section.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles (in this context, sharp-edged brutalist rectangles).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, etc.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
